name: Inflammasome Activation
description: NLRP3 inflammasome: a priming signal induces NLRP3 and pro-IL-1beta, a second danger signal triggers NLRP3-ASC-caspase-1 assembly, and active caspase-1 matures IL-1beta and cleaves gasdermin D to drive pyroptosis.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Signal 1: PAMP/TLR"]
    N2["NF-kB primes NLRP3, pro-IL-1b"]
    N3["Signal 2: DAMP / K+ efflux"]
    N4{"Both signals present?"}
    N5["NLRP3 oligomerizes"]
    N6["ASC speck recruits casp-1"]
    N7["Caspase-1 autoactivation"]
    N8["Cleave pro-IL-1b/IL-18"]
    N9["Cleave gasdermin D"]
    N10["GSDMD pores; pyroptosis"]
    N11["IL-1b release; inflammation"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N4
    N3 --> N4
    N4 -->|yes| N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N7 --> N9
    N8 --> N11
    N9 --> N10
    N10 --> N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: NF-kB primes NLRP3, pro-IL-1b
nodeDetails.detail: Transcriptional induction of NLRP3 and pro-IL-1beta

nodeDetails.label: Signal 2: DAMP / K+ efflux
nodeDetails.detail: Danger signal (K+ efflux, ROS, lysosomal damage)

nodeDetails.label: GSDMD pores; pyroptosis
nodeDetails.detail: Membrane pores drive lytic cell death

sources.title: The inflammasome: a molecular platform triggering activation of inflammatory caspases and processing of proIL-beta
sources.authors: Martinon, F.; Burns, K.; Tschopp, J.

sources.title: The NLRP3 inflammasome: molecular activation and regulation to therapeutics
